subjects.description: Two small crumpled white polythene bags of ordinary carrier-bag size, semi-transparent thin plastic material, lying flat and still on the asphalt road surface ahead of the ego vehicle on a calm, wind-free day
subjects.appearance_details: Both are ordinary small grocery carrier bags; one is slightly more crumpled, the other a little flatter; both have wrinkled, shiny surfaces catching light; faint printed text or logos partially visible on one bag
subjects.relationship: The bags are the perceived obstacles that cause the ego vehicle to decelerate and stop
subjects.location: Center foreground to center midground, on the road surface directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame, consistent with ordinary grocery-sized polythene bags; remaining small even as the vehicle closes distance and never appearing oversized
subjects.orientation: Lying at slightly different angles, resting still and flat on the road
subjects.pose: Lying flat on the road, still and motionless
subjects.action: Lying motionless on the asphalt in the still air, not moving
subjects.state_changes: The bags lie still on the road throughout; as the vehicle slows and stops, they become more prominent as small, still objects due to the reduced distance

background_setting: A forested road at dawn under light mist, viewed from inside a moving vehicle; tall green late-spring trees crowd both verges, cool soft light filters through the canopy and wisps of ground fog drift over the damp asphalt. The air is calm and still. Two small stray polythene bags lie still on the damp road ahead.

lighting.conditions: Dawn, light mist, cool soft light
lighting.direction: Low early sun diffused through mist and canopy from ahead
lighting.shadows: Soft long low-contrast shadows through the misty trees onto the damp road around the bags
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool soft dawn illumination gently diffused by mist; the small white polythene bags stand out on the damp asphalt

aesthetics.composition: First-person dashcam framing on the forested road in one-point perspective into dawn mist, hood faintly visible at the bottom; trees funnel attention to the small bags ahead
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool greens and misty greys, damp asphalt tones, with the small white polythene bags standing out as pale shapes
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Mundane dawn drive disrupted by a whimsical encounter; cautious, mildly humorous tension
aesthetics.patterns: Lane markings and tree trunks repeating into drifting dawn mist

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving dashcam-style shot that decelerates sharply and abruptly to a complete stop early in the clip; subtle vibrations consistent with vehicle motion that smooth out once the vehicle halts and then holds completely static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's eye-level perspective, capturing the full road width and surrounding environment
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level, slightly above the road surface consistent with a sedan-height dashboard camera
cinematography.depth_of_field: Deep, gently hazed by mist at distance
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the small bags and road ahead, softened by dawn mist beyond

context: Autonomous driving or dashcam scenario demonstrating a vehicle's cautious response to unexpected debris on the road, potentially for driver-assistance system training or road driving documentation

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward along the misty forested road at a moderate speed; two small bags are visible ahead resting still on the damp road in the calm air.
The vehicle decelerates sharply and abruptly on the damp road, braking hard and coming to a complete stop by 0:02, treating the small resting bags as obstacles.

The vehicle is fully stopped from the very start of this segment and remains completely stationary for the final three seconds; the small bags stay still on the damp road just a few meters ahead as dawn mist drifts.

segments.description: The ego vehicle moves forward at a moderate speed along the misty forested road, spring-green trees on either side. Ahead, two small white polythene bags rest still on the damp road in the calm air.
segments.key_changes: Polythene bags resolve from barely visible specks toward recognizable small shapes as the vehicle closes distance
segments.camera: Forward-moving dashcam perspective at moderate speed with slight vehicle vibration

segments.description: The vehicle brakes sharply and abruptly on the damp road, decelerating hard and coming to a complete stop by 0:02. The small bags remain still on the road ahead.
segments.key_changes: Speed drops rapidly to zero within this one second; a hard, abrupt halt completed by 0:02
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion decelerating sharply with a pronounced pitch-forward, settling quickly to stationary

segments.description: The vehicle is already fully stopped at the very start of this segment and remains completely motionless for the final three seconds, a few meters behind the bags as dawn mist drifts, treating the harmless small bags as road obstacles.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle held at a full stop from the beginning of the segment; camera stationary with minimal idle vibration; bags remain still and motionless on the road
segments.camera: Stationary dashcam view with minimal vibration from idling engine

temporal_caption: At 0:00, the view from inside a vehicle shows a forested road at dawn under light mist, spring-green trees and drifting ground fog around it as the vehicle moves forward at a moderate pace in calm, still air; two small white polythene bags rest still on the damp road ahead. Around 0:01, the vehicle begins a sharp, abrupt deceleration, braking hard as the small bags sit motionless on the asphalt. By 0:02, the vehicle has come to a complete stop. From 0:02 to 0:05, the vehicle stays fully halted and motionless a few meters behind the two small polythene bags, which remain still on the damp road as dawn mist drifts.
audio_description: Ambient fresh misty-dawn forest audio begins with muffled tire roll on damp asphalt and full birdsong. Around 0:01 the engine note drops sharply and a brief hard-braking sound is audible as the vehicle decelerates abruptly. The air is calm and still. By 0:02 the tire noise falls to near silence and, from 0:02 to 0:05, a low idle rumble under birdsong dominates while the bags rest silently on the road.
